creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Jimmie,

Would you please remove all three *quvi* ports and install multimedia/quvi
again? It should be OK then.
Thanks.

Regards,
-- 
   Sunpoet Po-Chuan Hsieh <sunpoet at sunpoet.net> <sunpoet at FreeBSD.org>
